raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I charged my Costco Citi Visa card for {$7500.00} as part of an agreement I had with XXXX  XXXX ( XXXX ) to provide architectural drawings and engineering design for my home remodeling project. XXXX kept the fact from me that it went into bankruptcy before I made the payment. I am not able to recover the fund from DE after making several attempts, despite the fact that XXXX has not fulfilled its obligation per the contract terms. Therefore, I turned to Citi Visa to open the dispute in XX/XX/XXXX. After several months of back and forth responding to document requests, on XX/XX/XXXX, I learned from talking to the Dispute line that the case was denied. I was told that Citi has no way of reopening the case and that XXXX made the decision, not Citi. Clearly, the services were not provided and I was denied a refund/billing adjustment of the full amount. Citi could not provide me with a contact at XXXX in order for me to inquire a specific reason other than not sufficient information to arrive at a favorable decision. I have provided all the documents requested of me with explanations.
